title: Organic 2 Pack 15 Gallon / 34 Gallon Garden Compost Bins Environmental Reusable Pe Waste Disposal Compost Bags for Kitchen Garden Yard
description: Product Description Big Opening in Front The Velcro on the front of the compost bag is designed with a large opening, which makes it easy to observe the growth of plants and fermentation in the bag. Velcro Design The front of the compost bag has a Velcro opening and closing design, which is very convenient to use. Product description: color: green Pc: 2pcs Capacity: 15 gallons and 34 gallons INNOLITES bag's features : 1. Very good flexibility and not easy to tear 2. Anti-aging and durable to use 3. more thicker material, long service life 4. Automatically absorb water, effectively prevent decay Muli-function garden storage bag In addition to being used as a growing bag and fermentation bag for various plants in the garden, it can also be used as a garden storage bag. It is also very convenient to store fallen garden leaves and various garbage Plant bag's details: Porous and ventilated, no roots rotten Zipper design, easy to use Large opening and Velcro design

product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Always use gloves when handling compost. Avoid touching face or eyes with unwashed hands. Keep compost bin clean and well-ventilated to prevent the buildup of harmful gases. Do not compost sharp objects or hazardous materials.
